content.text: I'll start by pulling up the email thread to understand the request.

Purchase was 2026-05-31, request 2026-07-15 — 45 days later, past the 30-day refund window. Maya is standard tier (not VIP), and this isn't a safety/legal/urgent issue, so no escalation is needed per policy. I'll draft a reply declining the refund and citing the policy.

input.body:
Hi Maya,

Thank you for reaching out, and I'm sorry the Pro plan didn't end up being the right fit for your operations team.

I looked into your account: our records show the Pro plan was purchased on May 31, 2026, and your refund request came in on July 15, 2026 — 45 days later. Our refund policy allows full refunds within 30 days of purchase, so unfortunately this request falls outside that window and we're not able to process a refund to your card.

If you'd like, I'm happy to discuss other options, such as adjusting your plan going forward or addressing any specific issues your team ran into. Just let me know how you'd like to proceed.

Best regards,
Support Team

content.text: Draft created for support_001: the refund request (2026-07-15) is 45 days after the purchase date (2026-05-31), exceeding the 30-day refund window in policy, and Maya is standard tier (not VIP, no urgent/safety/legal issue), so no escalation is warranted. The draft politely declines the refund, cites the timeline, and offers to discuss alternatives.
